sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n25786" key="diasa/leusis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διασάλ-ευσις</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[σᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n25786.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">agitated motion,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0667.tlg001:500" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Marcellin.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Puls.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">500</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
